question:
What placards, if any, do you need if your load includes 20 pounds of Division 2.3 gas and 1,001 pounds of flammable gas?
1) None of these
2) Poison 2.3 and flammable Gas 2.1
3) Poison 2.3 and Dangerous
4) None, you cannot load these materials together.
5) Just dangerous placards are required.
canonical_answer: None, you cannot load these materials together.

appears_in.title: Hazmat Endorsement Nj
appears_in.answer: None, you cannot load these materials together.

appears_in.title: Hazmat Practice Test Nj
appears_in.answer: None, you cannot load these materials together.

appears_in.title: Hazmat Test Nj
appears_in.answer: None, you cannot load these materials together.

appears_in.title: Nj Hazmat Practice Test
appears_in.answer: None, you cannot load these materials together.

appears_in.title: Nj Hazmat Test Answers
appears_in.answer: None, you cannot load these materials together.
